description_long: This coatrack features a cylindrical central post made of wood, supported by a wide, circular wooden base for stability. Multiple evenly spaced wooden pegs protrude perpendicularly from the central post in a staggered arrangement, providing ample space for hanging coats, hats, or bags. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the object a natural, rustic appearance, while the finish appears slightly worn, especially on the base, suggesting frequent use. The pegs are robust and rounded at the ends to prevent damage to hanging items. There are no visible decorative elements or embellishments, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The overall construction is solid and functional, suitable for placement in entryways, lobbies, or waiting areas.
description: A sturdy, wooden freestanding coatrack with a circular base and multiple staggered pegs for hanging items. The design is simple and functional, with a natural wood finish and visible grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular base and staggered pegs extending from the central post, with visible wood grain and some wear on the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the alternating arrangement of the pegs and the cylindrical shape of the post, with more wear visible on the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite set of pegs and the smooth, rounded finish of the base, with less visible wear.
description_view_3: Another side view showing the staggered pegs and the clean, natural wood finish, with the base appearing slightly less worn.
